comments.text: Investigated failing GH Actions run 22127971752. Failures: console-ui TypeScript error in AnimatedSelector, rust fmt diff, python black check failing. Starting local fixes.

comments.text: Fixes in progress: updated AnimatedSelector tween type; repaired TaskDetailPanel JSX nesting; removed unsupported marked options and forced sync parse; fixed issue-colors CSS variable typing; added IssueSelectionContext typing. Local console typecheck now passes.
